name: swoosh
description: Intent-driven, policy-driven model routing for TypeScript.

scripts.build: bun run --filter='@swoosh-dev/router' build && bun run --filter='@swoosh-dev/ai-sdk' build && bun run --filter='@swoosh-dev/capabilities' build && bun run --filter='@swoosh-dev/judge' build && bun run --filter='@swoosh-dev/sdk' build && bun run --filter='@swoosh-dev/testing' build
scripts.docs: bun run build && bun run scripts/gen-llms.ts
